nodes.name: Webhook: Order Created
nodes.notes: SETUP: In Shopify Admin → Settings → Notifications → Webhooks, add this URL for the 'Order creation' event. Format: JSON.

parameters.subject: =🛍️ Order Confirmed — #{{ $json.order_number }} | {{ $json['REPLACE_WITH_STORE_NAME'] || 'Your Store' }}
parameters.message:
=

✅ Order Confirmed!

Thanks {{ $json.customer_name }}, your order is on its way!

Order #{{ $json.order_number }}

{{ $json.items_list }}

Total: {{ $json.currency }} {{ $json.total_price }}

📦 Shipping To

{{ $json.shipping_address }}

Estimated Delivery: {{ $json.estimated_delivery }}

Track Your Order

REPLACE_WITH_STORE_NAME | REPLACE_WITH_STORE_SUPPORT_EMAIL

nodes.name: Log Order to Sheets
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create sheet tab 'Orders' with columns: Order_ID | Order_Number | Customer_Name | Customer_Email | Total | Currency | Items_Count | Shipping_Address | Estimated_Delivery | Review_Request_Date | Status | Created_At

nodes.name: Wait 3 Days (After Delivery)
nodes.notes: Waits 3 days after delivery estimate before sending review request. Adjust timing as needed.

parameters.subject: =⭐ How was your order? — #{{ $('Parse Order Data').first().json.order_number }}
parameters.message:
=

⭐ How did we do, {{ $('Parse Order Data').first().json.customer_name }}?

Your order #{{ $('Parse Order Data').first().json.order_number }} should have arrived by now. We'd love to hear what you think!

Leaving a review takes less than 60 seconds and helps other customers like you make great decisions.

Leave a Review ⭐

Have an issue with your order? Reply to this email — we make it right, guaranteed.

REPLACE_WITH_STORE_NAME | Unsubscribe

nodes.name: Webhook: Abandoned Cart
nodes.notes: SETUP: In Shopify, use a Klaviyo/Omnisend/custom app to fire a webhook on cart abandonment. Or use Shopify's 'Checkouts/create' webhook and filter by non-completion.

parameters.subject: =🛒 You left something behind, {{ $json.customer_name }}!
parameters.message:
=

🛒 Forgot something?

Hey {{ $json.customer_name }}, you left these in your cart:

{{ $json.items_list }}

Complete My Order →

REPLACE_WITH_STORE_NAME | Unsubscribe

parameters.subject: =⏰ Your cart expires soon — save {{ $('Parse Abandoned Cart').first().json.currency }} {{ $('Parse Abandoned Cart').first().json.cart_total }}
parameters.message:
=

⏰ Your cart is about to expire

Hey {{ $('Parse Abandoned Cart').first().json.customer_name }}, just a heads-up — your saved items won't be reserved much longer.

Cart value: {{ $('Parse Abandoned Cart').first().json.currency }} {{ $('Parse Abandoned Cart').first().json.cart_total }}

Save My Cart Now →

REPLACE_WITH_STORE_NAME | Unsubscribe

parameters.subject: =🎁 Last chance + a little something for you
parameters.message:
=

🎁 We want you back

Hey {{ $('Parse Abandoned Cart').first().json.customer_name }}, this is our final reminder about your cart.

Use code REPLACE_WITH_DISCOUNT_CODE for REPLACE_WITH_DISCOUNT_PERCENT% off your order.

Claim My Discount →

Offer expires in 24 hours.

REPLACE_WITH_STORE_NAME | Unsubscribe

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches errors from any node. Connect error outputs here.

motionElevation.description:
SETUP README:

THIS WORKFLOW HAS 2 FLOWS:

FLOW A — Order Confirmation + Review Request:
1. In Shopify: Settings → Notifications → Webhooks → Add webhook
   - Event: Order creation
   - URL: Copy from 'Webhook: Order Created' node
   - Format: JSON
2. Replace REPLACE_WITH_STORE_EMAIL with your store's sending email
3. Replace REPLACE_WITH_STORE_NAME in email templates
4. Replace REPLACE_WITH_SHOP_DOMAIN with your myshopify.com domain
5. Replace REPLACE_WITH_REVIEW_URL with your Google/Trustpilot review link

FLOW B — Abandoned Cart (3-email sequence at 1h, 24h, 72h):
1. Configure your abandoned cart trigger:
   Option A: Use Shopify's 'Checkouts/create' webhook
   Option B: Use a Shopify app (ReConvert, Klaviyo) to fire the webhook
2. Replace REPLACE_WITH_DISCOUNT_CODE with a real Shopify discount code
3. Replace REPLACE_WITH_DISCOUNT_PERCENT with the discount amount (e.g. 10)
4. Replace REPLACE_WITH_UNSUBSCRIBE_URL with your unsubscribe page

GOOGLE SHEETS SETUP:
- Tab 'Orders': Order_ID | Order_Number | Customer_Name | Customer_Email | Total | Currency | Items_Count | Shipping_Address | Estimated_Delivery | Review_Request_Date | Status | Created_At
- Tab 'Abandoned_Carts': Cart_ID | Customer_Email | Customer_Name | Cart_Total | Currency | Recovery_URL | Sequence_Complete | Created_At

COMPLIANCE NOTE: Include unsubscribe links in all marketing emails (GDPR / CAN-SPAM).
